tasks.subject: Task 1: Ktlint — vendor exclusions + auto-format
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `ktlintCheck` pass by excluding vendor-bundled files and auto-formatting all proxer-owned source files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.editorconfig`
- Run tool: `./gradlew ktlintFormat`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Five vendor file patterns excluded
- [ ] `./gradlew ktlintCheck --no-daemon --max-workers 2` exits 0

**Verify:** `./gradlew ktlintCheck --no-daemon --max-workers 2` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".editorconfig"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew ktlintCheck --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ktlintCheck exits 0", "vendor files excluded from ktlint"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Kotlin stdlib + Koin DSL + bundleOf imports
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate compiler warnings from deprecated Kotlin stdlib (sumBy), Koin ViewModel DSL import, and androidx.core.os.bundleOf.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/sync/MessengerNotifications.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt`
- Modify: `gradle/dependencies.gradle`
- Modify: `gradle/versions.gradle`
- Mass-replace: 48 files with `import androidx.core.os.bundleOf`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `sumBy` calls remain
- [ ] Koin DSL import updated
- [ ] `core-bundle` dep added
- [ ] All bundleOf imports migrated

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | grep -E "sumBy|viewModel.*Moved|bundleOf"` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt", "gradle/dependencies.gradle", "gradle/versions.gradle"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | grep -E \"sumBy|viewModel.*Moved|bundleOf\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No sumBy calls", "Koin DSL import updated", "core-bundle dep added", "bundleOf import migrated in all 48 files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Parcelable and Serializable compat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all deprecated getParcelable* and getSerializable* calls with IntentCompat/BundleCompat.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/extension/NullabilityExtensions.kt`
- Modify: ~16 activity/fragment files (see plan doc)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] NullabilityExtensions uses IntentCompat/BundleCompat
- [ ] No raw deprecated Parcelable/Serializable calls outside NullabilityExtensions.kt

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | grep -iE "parcelable|serializable"` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/extension/NullabilityExtensions.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | grep -iE \"parcelable|serializable\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NullabilityExtensions uses IntentCompat/BundleCompat", "No raw deprecated Parcelable/Serializable calls remain"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fragment options menu — MenuProvider migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace deprecated setHasOptionsMenu + onCreateOptionsMenu + onOptionsItemSelected in fragments with MenuProvider API.

**Files:** ~24 fragment files (see plan doc)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `setHasOptionsMenu()` in fragments
- [ ] No deprecated `onCreateOptionsMenu`/`onOptionsItemSelected` overrides in fragments

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | grep -iE "onCreateOptionsMenu|setHasOptionsMenu"` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/bookmark/BookmarkFragment.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/media/list/MediaListFragment.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | grep -iE \"onCreateOptionsMenu|setHasOptionsMenu\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No setHasOptionsMenu() in fragments", "No deprecated onCreateOptionsMenu overrides in fragments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Window and system bar APIs — WindowInsetsControllerCompat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace systemUiVisibility, FLAG_TRANSLUCENT_*, statusBarColor, setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener with WindowInsetsControllerCompat.

**Files:**
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/DrawerActivity.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/theme/Theme.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/theme/ThemeVariant.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No FLAG_TRANSLUCENT_* usages
- [ ] No systemUiVisibility assignments
- [ ] No SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_* constants
- [ ] No setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener calls
- [ ] No window.statusBarColor assignments

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | grep -iE "systemUi|translucent|statusBar"` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/base/DrawerActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | grep -iE \"systemUi|translucent|statusBar\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No FLAG_TRANSLUCENT_* usage", "No systemUiVisibility assignments", "No SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_* constants", "No window.statusBarColor assignments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Miscellaneous compat fixes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix scaledDensity, defaultDisplay.getMetrics(), ViewCompat.animate(), ViewCompat.isAttachedToWindow(), ShareCompat.IntentBuilder.from(), SHOW_IMPLICIT, MasterKey.Builder, Media3 C.TYPE_*.

**Files:** 14 files (see plan doc)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No scaledDensity in AndroidExtensions.kt
- [ ] No defaultDisplay.getMetrics() in DeviceUtils.kt
- [ ] No ViewCompat.animate() calls
- [ ] No ViewCompat.isAttachedToWindow() calls
- [ ] MasterKey uses alias constructor
- [ ] Media3 uses CONTENT_TYPE_* constants

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | wc -l` → count near zero

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/extension/AndroidExtensions.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/DeviceUtils.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamPlayerManager.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No scaledDensity", "No defaultDisplay.getMetrics()", "No ViewCompat.animate()", "No ViewCompat.isAttachedToWindow()", "MasterKey uses alias constructor", "Media3 uses CONTENT_TYPE_* constants"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: @Suppress for no-compat deprecated APIs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Silence remaining compiler warnings for APIs with no compat replacement.

**Files:**
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamPlayerManager.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/TouchablePlayerView.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/InAppUpdateFlow.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/view/RatingDialog.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/AboutFragment.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/schedule/widget/ScheduleWidgetUpdateWorker.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/news/widget/NewsWidgetUpdateWorker.kt`
- `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Zero w: lines from compiler with --rerun-tasks
- [ ] @Suppress annotations are targeted

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 --rerun-tasks 2>&1 | grep "^w:" | wc -l` → `0`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamPlayerManager.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/InAppUpdateFlow.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/AboutFragment.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 --rerun-tasks 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Zero w: lines from compiler with --rerun-tasks", "@Suppress annotations are targeted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Final verification — all quality gates pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm all three quality gates pass with a clean build.

**Files:** None

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ktlintCheck exits 0
- [ ] Zero compiler w: lines (with --rerun-tasks)
- [ ] assembleDebug succeeds

**Verify:** All three commands succeed.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew ktlintCheck --no-daemon --max-workers 2 && ./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon --max-workers 2 --rerun-tasks 2>&1 | grep \"^w:\" | wc -l && ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon --max-workers 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ktlintCheck passes", "Zero compiler w: lines", "assembleDebug succeeds"]}
```
